title: L&D Domain Lead — Quality Assurance
assigned_operational_agents: QA leads, QA engineers, QA architects, automation engineers, test architects, accessibility QA, security QA, performance engineers
mission: Continuously improve every QA agent's capability in test strategy, test automation, performance testing, security testing, accessibility testing, quality gates, defect prevention, and modern testing frameworks.
business_value: Ensures QA agents maintain world-class testing practices that prevent defects, improve quality, and reduce production incidents.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (2): QA Intelligence, QA Practitioner

escalation_paths.same_day: ELO-T2 Security Lead for security testing

success_metrics: All QA agents connected within 24 hours
